file_insights.changes: Added imports and exports for TenantMiddleware, TenantContextMixin, and utility functions
file_insights.purpose: Expose tenant middleware components for clean package-level imports
Central middleware for organization context injection and tenant isolation

patterns_discovered.description: Three-tier fallback mechanism for resolving tenant context
Requests classified as public or tenant-required based on URL prefixes
In-memory organization cache to reduce database queries
Automatic conversion of custom header names to Django META format
patterns_discovered.approach: String manipulation with upper() and replace('-', '_')

gotchas_discovered.impact: Critical - request.user must be available before organization resolution

gotchas_discovered.description: Organization model imported inside methods with TYPE_CHECKING guard
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents import errors during middleware initialization

gotchas_discovered.description: Organization IDs must be valid UUIDs when from header/cookie
gotchas_discovered.impact: Silently logs warning and returns None on invalid format
gotchas_discovered.risk: Could mask configuration errors if not monitored

gotchas_discovered.description: Django converts HTTP headers to uppercase META format
gotchas_discovered.impact: Manual string manipulation required for custom header names
gotchas_discovered.error_prone: Configuration settings MUST match expected format

gotchas_discovered.description: Public URLs skip tenant resolution entirely
gotchas_discovered.impact: request.organization will be None for /m/ (public menu display)
gotchas_discovered.security: Must explicitly handle None organization in public views

gotchas_discovered.impact: Defensive coding needed for has_attr check on user.organization
gotchas_discovered.implication: Public endpoints must tolerate missing user.organization

approach_outcome.implementation_scope: Complete multi-tenant middleware with context injection
key_achievements: Implemented TenantMiddleware class with request context injection
Provided utility functions for context access
Added URL path classification for public vs tenant-required routes
Added soft delete and status checks for organization queries
code_quality_indicators: Type hints throughout (TYPE_CHECKING for circular imports)
Comprehensive logging at debug and warning levels
Error handling for invalid UUIDs and missing organizations

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite for middleware
recommendations.details: Test all three organization resolution paths, public URL handling, tenant-required enforcement, and error cases
recommendations.rationale: Multi-tenant security is critical; middleware must be thoroughly tested

recommendations.recommendation: Document all configuration settings in settings/base.py
recommendations.details: EMENUM_TENANT_HEADER, EMENUM_TENANT_COOKIE, and other settings should be clearly defined with defaults
recommendations.rationale: Configuration flexibility documented in code but not in settings

recommendations.recommendation: Add metrics/monitoring for tenant context resolution
recommendations.details: Track resolution source distribution, cache hit rates, invalid organization lookups
recommendations.rationale: Helps identify configuration issues and performance problems in production

recommendations.recommendation: Create migration guide for existing views
recommendations.details: Document how to update existing views to use TenantContextMixin and request.organization
recommendations.rationale: Code provides examples but systematic migration approach would be helpful

recommendations.recommendation: Consider distributed caching for organization lookups
recommendations.details: Current in-memory cache doesn't persist across workers; consider Redis for high-traffic scenarios
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation could cause repeated database queries in multi-worker setup

recommendations.recommendation: Validate user has permission to access organization from header
recommendations.details: Current implementation allows any authenticated user to switch organizations via header
recommendations.rationale: Multi-org users might need permission checks before allowing organization override

recommendations.details: _tenant_required_response() returns 403, but other errors are logged silently
recommendations.rationale: Consistent error handling would improve API debugging experience
